column1: Tata Motors Group is a global automobile manufacturer. Part of the multi-national conglomerate, the Tata group, it offers a wide and diverse portfolio of cars, sports utility vehicles, etc. It has operations in India, the UK, South Korea, South Africa, China, Brazil, Austria and Slovakia through a strong global network of subsidiaries, associate companies and Joint Ventures (JVs), including Jaguar Land Rover in the UK and Tata Daewoo in South Korea.
